name: C-SSRS
title: Columbia Suicide Severity Rating Scale (C-SSRS) Screening
description: Screening version of the Columbia Suicide Severity Rating Scale. Binary yes/no for suicidal ideation and behavior.

item.text: Have you wished you were dead or wished you could go to sleep and not wake up?
Have you actually had any thoughts of killing yourself?
Have you been thinking about how you might do this?
Have you had these thoughts and had some intention of acting on them?
Have you started to work out or worked out the details of how to kill yourself? Do you intend to carry out this plan?

Have you ever done anything, started to do anything, or prepared to do anything to end your life? (Examples: collected items to harm yourself, obtained access to means, rehearsed, wrote a suicide note, went to a dangerous location, or actually attempted to end your life.)
